title: PSWG Addon: Clone Wars
description: An official addon for Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG) that brings content from the Clone Wars era to the game!
body:
An official addon for [Galaxies: Parzi's Star Wars Mod (PSWG)](https://modrinth.com/mod/pswg) that brings content from the Clone Wars era to the game!

Content including:

* DC-17 blaster pistol
* Phase 1 and 2 Clone Trooper armor

This addon is part of a series of addons adding content from various eras throughout Star Wars history that aren't covered by the base mod. For more addons, see the PSWG project page!
